title: lasianthus attenuatus var. minor
intro: Lasianthus attenuatus var. minor, also known as the Taiwan mountain tea, is a variant of the Lasianthus attenuatus species, a type of flowering plant native to Taiwan and Southeast Asia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus attenuatus var. minor include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties.
